story: After I put down the man who was both partner and husband, I drive to the Blue Magic as Summer Smith. Out front, the valet watched a black van idle by the alley and five masked men in jackets stamped with his emblem fan toward the rear exit. Inside I find Black Celeste; our eyes agree on leaving. A drunk grabs her; I crack a bottle across his face and we run for the back. We kiss, she asks if he’s gone, I say yes, and we shove at the back door.
implausible_knowledge: Out front, the valet watched a black van idle by the alley and five masked men in jackets stamped with his emblem fan toward the rear exit.
question: As Summer and Celeste push at the back door to slip away, what will Summer do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Pull Celeste back inside and cut through the crowded front to exit there, avoiding the alley.
answer_without_knowledge: Shove through the back door and run into the alley to make a quick escape.
